alerts.title: OFFICIAL RELEASE: Claude Fable 5
alerts.detail: Anthropic has officially announced and released Claude Fable 5! It is available via the Claude Platform, AWS, GCP, and Azure at $10/$50 per million tokens. It features the new Mythos architecture with heavy safety guardrails.

alerts.title: Leaks: Re-confirming details
alerts.detail: General community consensus is reaching a fever pitch with the combination of the Alex Heath leak and the continued presence of Azure checkpoints. Traders are expecting an announcement before close of business.

alerts.title: Leaks: Re-confirming details
alerts.detail: General community consensus is reaching a fever pitch with the combination of the Alex Heath leak and the continued presence of Azure checkpoints. Traders are expecting an announcement before close of business.

alerts.title: Leaks: Re-confirming details
alerts.detail: Social media rumors continue to circulate without any official confirmation from Anthropic. The hype remains anchored to the Alex Heath leak and the Azure backend sightings.

verdict.reasoning: Anthropic has officially published the release of Claude Fable 5 on their website and developer portals. The model is live and accessible. Prediction market traders who held 'Yes' have won.
